closureNotes.outcome: Production parity deploy executed clean end-to-end 2026-06-05. SR anchor landed at PR #130 (34c3578). Deploy ran via deploy-production-app.yml workflow_dispatch --ref ed6fc3396952caf43594e71d1c0334c6d4ed0e6e; production image updated from a59f22e (2026-04-15, 7 weeks stale) to ed6fc33. Post-deploy: /api/health status=healthy buildSha=ed6fc33 score=100; /lb-health 200 blue+green; n8n canary 200 pre+post. 8h soak clean: 0 rollbacks, 0 alertmanager pages, 0 break-glass. L4 browser-verified login+dashboard post-soak. FU-EB-PROD-DEPLOY-GAP-2026-04-21 closed in PR #301 (4f36a59af). FU-EB-CIS-SERVICES-1-PROD-TAG-DRIFT-1 filed P3 (cis-services-1 droplet carries environment:production tag but is canonically env-cis; benign for deploy, tracked for catalog hygiene). health-validation job step had a false-positive curl --no-follow failure (tracked as FU-EB-DEPLOY-PROD-APP-HEALTH-VALIDATION-CURL-NO-FOLLOW-1 P2); the deploy itself succeeded. EB-side scope-files (SPEC.md + TRUTH-DELIVERED.json) landed in PR #302 (a4e840025c9f) to complete canonical scope per SR spec.
